intro:
There is no information on the plant "Belvala virgata". However, I believe you might be referring to "Valeriana officinalis", commonly known as Valerian. Valerian is a perennial flowering plant known for its medicinal and fragrant properties.

Valerian is a natural remedy used to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality due to its sedative effects. The bioactive constituents of Valerian include valerenic acid, isovaleric acid, and valerenol, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Valerian include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to support relaxation, improve sleep, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and restlessness.
